title: Two Column Article

statement.markdown:
### Two Column Article

Create a two-column layout where the left column is 20% of the page width and the right column is 80% of the page width. Add a heading and a paragraph to each column. Ensure the text wraps properly and the columns stay balanced.
heading: Two Column Article
requirements
The layout should be responsive and work on different screen sizes.
The left column should be 20% of the page width.
The right column should be 80% of the page width.
The text in each column should wrap properly.
The columns should stay balanced on different screen sizes.

constraints: Use Tailwind CSS classes for styling.
The layout should work on different screen sizes.

starterCode.html:

    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Two Column Article</title>
    <link href="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com" rel="stylesheet">
</head>
<body>

    <!-- Your code here -->

</body>
</html>

gradingCriteria.description: The layout is responsive and works on different screen sizes.
The left column is 20% of the page width.
The right column is 80% of the page width.
The text in each column wraps properly.
The columns stay balanced on different screen sizes.
